calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-12-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: JPT: David May, Clerk: Karissa Shaw, Not reported. (525)

APPEARANCES:
Plato Barnes, Appellant, appearing in Pro Per.
Jon Stringer, Respondent, appearing in Pro Per.
Witnesses for Respondent: Willie Williams and Theresa DeRouen

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

The Court questions the litigants as to the factual issues of the case.

The Court questions witnesses Williams and DeRouen regarding the litigants' testimony.

The Court allows the litigants to give statements regarding what was said during each other's testimony and the testimony of the witnesses.

(The Court recesses matter for approximately 30 minutes whilst Respondent Stringer organizes his evidence).

The Court hears further testimony from the litigants regarding evidence.

The following Respondent's exhibits are ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE:
#1 - Handwritten Letter from Patricia Perez
#2 - Receipt and Admittance Paper for Kaiser dated 8/6/04
#3 - Copy of Exhibit #2
#4 - Police Report dated 8/5/04, #040892657

The following Appellant's exhibit is ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE:
#A - Notice to Appear for Plato Barnes dated 8/5/04, #097694833

The Court hears closing arguments and the matter is taken under submission.

JUDGMENT RENDERED. All exhibits ordered returned.
